# CloverSec CTF For Example 1.0.13

This release tightens the final delivery folder rules after real natural-prompt output still mixed process files into the human-facing package.

- Delivery scan now rejects process folders inside `题目手册/`; that folder may only contain `题目解题手册.md`.
- Legacy output normalization now filters `image.inspect.json`, `docker_artifacts*.json`, and other machine files out of `题目镜像/`.
- Delivery zip creation now refuses dirty directories instead of packaging `archive/`, `_cache/`, `reports/`, `manifests/`, `Hub提交材料/`, or `验证证据/`.
- Added `cloversec_ctf_delivery_package` to the workflow MCP so Agent can normalize an existing messy work/output directory before reporting the final path.
- `fetch-url` CLI now accepts both positional URL and `--url`, matching common Agent command usage.

Validation:

- `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'`
- `python3 /Users/d1a0y1bb/.codex/skills/.system/plugin-creator/scripts/validate_plugin.py plugins/cloversec-ctf-forexample`
- `python3 scripts/validate_release.py`
- Real repackage tests against the JSFS and zoo feedback form output folders from prior natural/full-flow runs.
